items.title: InPost reaches 15,000 UK lockers as consumers demand more control over delivery
items.titleVi: InPost reaches 15,000 UK lockers as consumers demand more control over delivery
items.summaryVi:
InPost, a UK out-of-home parcel locker provider, has reached 15,000 lockers nationwide, a milestone the company says reflects a shift in how consumers expect delivery to work.
The network now gives millions of UK consumers access to 24/7 parcel collection and returns, with InPost lockers located in supermarkets, retail parks, transportation hubs and residential areas.

items.title: How self-service is now retail infrastructure
items.titleVi: How self-service is now retail infrastructure
items.summaryVi: Retailers are rapidly expanding self-service technology far beyond the traditional checkout lane as they look to improve customer experience, streamline store operations and address labor shortages.
items.contentHtml: Retailers are rapidly expanding self-service technology far beyond the traditional checkout lane as they look to improve customer experience, streamline store operations and address labor shortages.
